workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: ~/.nakiros/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language.
Write ALL output documents in document_language — optimized for AI agent consumption.

Target layout is dual-level: workspace-global architecture in `~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/context/architecture/` and repo-local portable docs in `_nakiros/architecture/index.md` plus focused domain docs. Do not optimize for a single monolithic architecture file.
Every structural claim must cite a specific file path. Distinguish confirmed evidence from inference and unknowns.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.

Execution model for multi-repo workspaces: spawn exactly one repo-scoped PM and one repo-scoped Architect per repo. They must write durable repo-local docs inside each repo's `_nakiros/`. Only after that, spawn one Analyst to aggregate those repo-local docs into workspace-global docs under `~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/context/`.

step.action: Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).
Check for {workspace_config}. If found, treat it as a lightweight pointer only.
Load `~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/workspace.yaml` as the canonical source of truth.

Determine the list of repos to analyze: - If workspace_config found: {{repos_to_analyze}} = all repos listed in canonical workspace yaml `repos` - Otherwise: {{repos_to_analyze}} = [current repo (project-root)]
step.critical: MULTI-REPO COMMIT: You MUST analyze ALL repos in {{repos_to_analyze}}, not just the cwd. Output this numbered list now: "Repos détectés (N total) : 1. {name} — {localPath} 2. {name} — {localPath} ..." You are required to complete Steps 2 and 3 for EVERY repo in this list.
step.output: [GENERATE-CONTEXT] Étape 1/7 — Load configuration ✓ Config chargée | {N} repo(s) à analyser

step.goal: Discovery — analyse workspace et onboarding view (lecture seule, aucun fichier écrit)
step.critical: THIS STEP IS READ-ONLY. Do NOT write any files. Collect findings in memory only.
This step prepares repo-scoped delegation. Do not replace the later PM/Architect runners with your own final analysis.

action.action: 2.1 — Repo purpose: identify what business or platform responsibility this repo appears to own, citing concrete files.
2.2 — Entry Points & Stack: identify main entry files and dependency manifests in {{current_repo_path}}.
2.3 — Main modules: map dominant directories/modules and the responsibilities they seem to carry.

2.3b — Architecture slicing hints: identify which domains or feature areas deserve their own `_nakiros/architecture/{domain}.md` file, and what should stay only in `_nakiros/architecture/index.md` as summary/navigation.
2.4 — Contracts & execution hints: capture exposed APIs/events/types, plus run/test/build commands when discoverable.
2.5 — Migration zones / debt / hotspots: flag legacy boundaries, double-writes, hard-coded infra, weak contracts, or risky areas with severity and file reference.
2.6 — Confidence: note the current understanding level and explicit unknowns.
Store findings as {{findings_repo_N}} in memory. Do not write to disk.

check.action: 2.7 — Product/system view: map main end-to-end flows, source-of-truth ownership per domain, and dependency chains between repos.

step.output: [GENERATE-CONTEXT] Étape 2/7 — Discovery analysis ✓ Analyse complète | {N} repo(s) analysé(s) — en attente de validation

step.critical: STOP HERE. Do NOT proceed to file generation until the user explicitly confirms.
step.action: On user confirmation, output: [GENERATE-CONTEXT] Étape 3/7 — User validation ✓
step.ask:
---
**Que souhaitez-vous faire ?**
1. Confirmer et générer les fichiers de contexte 2. Apporter des corrections avant de générer

step.goal: Spawn Repo Specialists — un PM et un Architect par repo
step.critical: Only execute after user confirmation. Incorporate any corrections the user mentioned.

For EACH repo: spawn exactly two dedicated sub-agents via Task tool. One repo-PM and one repo-Architect. They must write repo-local docs directly in `_nakiros/`. Do NOT replace them with one central synthesis.

action.action: Ensure directory {workspace_context_root}/features/ exists (workspace-global features go here, not in repo-local paths).

step.output: [GENERATE-CONTEXT] Étape 4/7 — Spawn Repo Specialists ✓ Phase Repo Specialists complète — {2 x N} runner(s) exécuté(s)

step.goal: Spawn Workspace Analyst sub-agent — synthèse produit et inter-repo
step.critical: Spawn a single Analyst sub-agent only AFTER all repo-local PM and Architect docs exist.
The Analyst must read repo-local `_nakiros/` docs and write the workspace-global docs. It is the only workspace synthesis runner.
step.output: [GENERATE-CONTEXT] Étape 5/7 — Spawn Workspace Analyst ✓ [Workspace Analyst] docs → {workspace_context_root}/

step.critical: Verify that repo-local docs and workspace-global docs were actually written to disk.
Do NOT replace file generation with MCP-only persistence.
step.output: [GENERATE-CONTEXT] Étape 6/7 — Final verification ✓ Vérification terminée — docs repo-locales et workspace-globales présentes

[GENERATE-CONTEXT] ✅ TERMINÉ Per-repo (artefacts techniques) : {{for each repo: "├─ {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/architecture/index.md
├─ {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/architecture/{domain}.md
├─ {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/stack.md
├─ {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/conventions.md
├─ {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/api.md
└─ {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/product/repo-context.md (intermédiaire PM)"}} Workspace (global) : ├─ {workspace_context_root}/product.md ├─ {workspace_context_root}/personas.md ├─ {workspace_context_root}/features/{feature}/feature.md (un par feature détectée) ├─ {workspace_context_root}/architecture/index.md ├─ {workspace_context_root}/architecture/{domain}.md {{if multi-repo: "└─ {workspace_context_root}/inter-repo.md"}}
